HOME.TITLE: Your healthy Asian meals for the week
HOME.SUBTITLE_ONE: Personalised menus based on your tastes, allergies and intolerances.
HOME.SUBTITLE_TWO: Choose between a weekly subscription or an individual order with a minimum purchase of €20.
HOME.WHY_TITLE: A simple, flexible and carefully crafted experience
HOME.HOW_TITLE: A quick summary to get started
HOME.HOW_TEXT: The dedicated How it works page includes the full process in detail.

personalized.TITLE: Personalised menus
personalized.TEXT: Adapted to real allergies, intolerances and nutritional preferences, and designed by our chefs specialised in nutrition and Asian cuisine.

balanced.TITLE: Balanced dishes
balanced.TEXT: Healthy Asian food with flavour and good nutritional balance.

delivery.TITLE: Delivery by time slot
delivery.TEXT: Receive your order in the time window that suits you best.

payment.TITLE: Fast and simple payment
payment.TEXT: A clear and agile process designed to make repeat orders easy.

sustainability.TITLE: Committed to the environment
sustainability.TEXT: We use recyclable containers and prioritise electric vehicles for delivery to reduce environmental impact.

one.TITLE: Place your first order
one.TEXT: Choose whether you want to start with an individual order or a weekly subscription.

two.TITLE: Pick your dishes and sign in
two.TEXT: Filter, add dishes to the cart and, when you go to payment, sign in or create your user account if you do not have one yet.

three.TITLE: Confirm and manage your orders
three.TEXT: Complete your profile if needed, confirm delivery and then you will be able to repeat, modify or renew your subscription faster.

MENU.NO_RESULTS: No dishes match the selected filters.
MENU.SUBSCRIPTION_SAVINGS: With a subscription you would save {{amount}}
MENU.WEIGHT_LOSS_RECOMMENDATION: Recommendations adjusted to your weight loss goal and your saved preferences.
MENU.MUSCLE_RECOMMENDATION: Recommendations adjusted to your muscle gain goal and your saved preferences.
MENU.GENERIC_RECOMMENDATION: Automatic recommendations based on your allergens and composition preferences.

BANNERS.WITH_PREVIOUS: Subscription active. This is your latest weekly selection. You can modify it here or renew it from Manage subscription. You currently have {{count}} dishes.
BANNERS.NEED_MORE: Subscription active. Choose at least {{minimum}} dishes to create your weekly selection. You currently have {{count}}/{{minimum}}.

LOGIN.TITLE: Sign in
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Enter your credentials to access SANZEN.
LOGIN.REGISTER_SUBTITLE: This form creates a new user in the database without modifying existing ones.

ERRORS.PASSWORD_MIN: Password must contain at least 6 characters.
ERRORS.NAME_MIN: Name must contain at least 2 characters.
ERRORS.REGISTER_GENERIC: The user could not be registered. Check whether the email already exists.

PROFILE.HERO_TEXT: Manage the personal, nutritional and payment details of your account.
PROFILE.ALLERGEN_NOTE: They will be used as a reference for your personal filters.
PROFILE.ADDRESS_NOTE: It will be used as the default address during payment.
PROFILE.CARD_NOTE: It will be reused automatically on the payment page.

PLACEHOLDERS.NAME: Your name
PLACEHOLDERS.CARDHOLDER: As it appears on the card

ERRORS.NAME: Name must contain at least 2 letters and cannot include numbers.
ERRORS.PASSWORD: Password must contain at least 6 characters.
ERRORS.ADDRESS_NAME: Address name must contain at least 2 characters.
ERRORS.STREET_NUMBER: Enter a valid street and number.
ERRORS.CITY: City must contain at least 2 letters and cannot include numbers.
ERRORS.PROVINCE: Province must contain at least 2 letters and cannot include numbers.
ERRORS.CARDHOLDER: Enter letters only in the cardholder name, exactly as it appears on the card.
ERRORS.EXPIRY: Use MM/YY format and a non-expired date.

SUBSCRIPTION.HERO_TEXT: Activate your subscription and then we will take you to the menu so you can choose a minimum of 5 dishes. From there you can add as many as you want.
SUBSCRIPTION.STATUS_HELP: You can activate or pause it whenever you want.
SUBSCRIPTION.CURRENT_SELECTION_COMPLETE: This is the selection that will be renewed weekly. You can review it here or go to the menu to modify it before renewing.
SUBSCRIPTION.CURRENT_SELECTION_INCOMPLETE: Your weekly selection is not complete yet. Go to the menu to reach the minimum of {{minimum}} dishes and activate the subscription correctly.
SUBSCRIPTION.EMPTY_SELECTION: There is no saved weekly selection yet. Go to the menu to choose your dishes and complete your weekly plan.
SUBSCRIPTION.SAVE_NOTE: When you save the plan we will take you to the menu. There you must choose at least {{minimum}} dishes and a {{discount}}% discount will be applied in the cart.
SUBSCRIPTION.WEEKLY_RENEWAL_NOTE: This renewal manually creates the next weekly order with the dishes saved in your subscription and moves the next delivery forward by seven days.

TOASTS.NEED_ACTIVE_AND_COMPLETE: You need an active subscription with at least 5 dishes to run the renewal.
TOASTS.RENEWAL_ERROR: The weekly renewal could not be simulated.
TOASTS.INCOMPLETE_EMPTY: Activate the subscription and choose at least {{minimum}} dishes in the menu.
TOASTS.INCOMPLETE_PARTIAL: You still need {{remaining}} dishes to complete the subscription. Continue in the menu to finish it.

SUMMARY.SUBSCRIPTION_INCOMPLETE: You must choose at least {{plan}} units for your subscription. You currently have {{selected}}/{{plan}} and still need {{remaining}}.
SUMMARY.MIN_ORDER_MISSING: Minimum order is €20. You still need {{amount}} to continue.

PAYMENT.COMPLETE_PROFILE_FIRST: Complete your profile first to have a delivery address available.

ERRORS.CARDHOLDER: Enter letters only in the cardholder name, exactly as it appears on the card.
ERRORS.EXPIRY: Use MM/YY format and a non-expired date.
ERRORS.CONFIRMATION: The order could not be registered on the server. Check the connection and try again.

CONFIRMATION.HERO_TITLE: Your order is already on the way
CONFIRMATION.HERO_TEXT: The payment simulation was completed successfully and the order has been registered.

ORDERS.EMPTY_TITLE: You do not have any orders yet
ORDERS.EMPTY_TEXT: When you confirm your first payment, the full history will appear here.

HOW.HERO_BADGE: First order, registered users and renewal
HOW.HERO_TEXT: SANZEN combines the first order, nutritional profile, individual order, weekly subscription, repeat orders and follow-up in a single flow.
HOW.STEPS_TITLE: How your order works from start to finish

one.TITLE: Place your first order
one.TEXT: From Home you can tap Place your first order and choose whether you want to start with an individual order or a weekly subscription.

two.TITLE: Filter and choose dishes
two.TEXT: In the menu you can apply filters by allergens, nutritional goal and composition preferences, see recommendations and add dishes to the cart.

three.TITLE: Sign in or create your user
three.TEXT: You can start the process as a guest. When going to payment, SANZEN will ask you to sign in or create a user to save the order.

four.TITLE: Complete your profile if needed
four.TEXT: If you are new, or if data is missing, you will complete your food preferences, address and card. If your profile is already complete, you will go straight to the last step of the order.

five.TITLE: Confirm delivery
five.TEXT: The individual order requires a minimum of €20. The weekly subscription requires at least 5 dishes. The delivery date is calculated taking previous orders into account.

six.TITLE: Place repeat orders faster
six.TEXT: If you already have an account and a complete profile, on your next orders you will only need to sign in, review the cart and confirm payment.

seven.TITLE: Manage and renew your subscription
seven.TEXT: If you have an active subscription, SANZEN keeps your latest weekly selection. From Manage subscription you can review it, modify it in the menu or manually launch the weekly renewal.

one.TITLE: Start from Home
one.TEXT: The landing page guides you with two clear access points inside Place your first order: Weekly subscription or Individual order.

two.TITLE: New user and existing user
two.TEXT: If you already have an account, the process is shorter. If you are new, SANZEN uses your first order to create the user and complete the profile with your dietary and payment details.

three.TITLE: Repeat orders and renewal
three.TEXT: Repeat orders reuse your saved profile. If you have an active subscription, you can review your current selection, modify it or renew it manually from Manage subscription.

ASSISTANT.TITLE: SANZEN Assistant
ASSISTANT.SEED_MESSAGE: I am the SANZEN assistant. I can help you choose dishes, understand your subscription or explain why you cannot continue.
ASSISTANT.ERROR_FALLBACK: I could not answer right now. Please try again in a few seconds.

MENU.COMPARE: Should I choose a subscription or an individual order?

SUBSCRIPTION.CONTENT: What does my current subscription contain?
SUBSCRIPTION.RENEW: How do I renew or modify my subscription?
